ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. ICC World Chambers Federation certificate with QR code and stamp.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. Issued by KorCo AB.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-23D-788990' does not contain an LC reference. Order no and Invoice no are standard references, not LC references.

consignor_search_result.search_details: Searched all text in the invoice file for 'Korab International' (case-insensitive). The invoice is issued by 'KorCo AB' with header/branding 'korco'. The name 'Korab International' does NOT appear anywhere in the invoice text — not in the header, address block, VAT block, footer, bank details, or any other section. The invoice issuer is 'KorCo AB' which is a different company name.

pairing_validation.details: Certificate references invoice no 51572, but invoice shows invoice no 51843 — NO MATCH. Certificate consignor is 'Korab International AB' but invoice issuer is 'KorCo AB' — different company names, 'Korab International' not found anywhere in invoice. Certificate consignee is 'Jamana Printers Limited, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania' but invoice SOLD TO is 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti., Istanbul, Turkey' — NO MATCH. NONE of the three pairing criteria are met.

candidates.raw_text: Plot No. 9 Nyerere Road, Pugu Road, P.O Box 5584, Dar es Salaam
candidates.normalized_text: plot no. 9 nyerere road, pugu road, p.o box 5584, dar es salaam

candidates.raw_text: Akçaburgaz Mah. 3437 Sok No:28/2, Esenyurt / Istanbul, Turkey
candidates.normalized_text: akçaburgaz mah. 3437 sok no:28/2, esenyurt / istanbul, turkey

candidates.raw_text:
25 Reels: Fully Bleached Liner
Subs 90gsm, RW 840~1100mm
25.356 MT AT EUR 900.00/MT, Amount: EUR 22,820.40
candidates.normalized_text: 25 reels fully bleached liner subs 90gsm rw 840~1100mm 25.356 mt

consignor.certificate_value: Korab International AB, Mårten Krakowgatan 2, SE411 04, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: KorCo AB, Mårten Krakowgatan 2, 411 04 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Korab International' anywhere in invoice text
comparison_steps.details: The name 'Korab International' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice issuer is 'KorCo AB'. Even after searching all text including header, branding ('korco'), address block, VAT block, bank details, and footer — the string 'Korab International' is absent.

comparison_steps.description: Compare company names as same legal party
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Korab International AB'. Invoice: 'KorCo AB'. These are different company names. 'Korab International' and 'KorCo' share no common identity-bearing core. 'Korab' vs 'KorCo' are different words. 'International' is absent from invoice name. Per rule 4.1.3.1 (gränser för namnmatchning), one or more words in the company name differ — 'Korab' vs 'KorCo' is a different word (not a spelling variation), and 'International' is absent. This constitutes MISMATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if one name is a prefix of the other
comparison_steps.details: 'KorCo AB' is not a prefix of 'Korab International AB'. 'Korab International AB' is not a prefix of 'KorCo AB'. The names differ in structure, not by truncation.

comparison_steps.description: Check if one is a recognized abbreviation of the other
comparison_steps.details: 'KorCo' is not a recognized commercial abbreviation of 'Korab International'. The abbreviation would need to consist of established abbreviations of words in the full legal name. 'KorCo' does not satisfy this — 'Kor' might loosely derive from 'Korab' and 'Co' from 'Company', but 'Company' is not part of the legal name 'Korab International AB'. This is speculative and not permitted.

comparison_steps.description: Check if commercial name vs registered name with matching address
comparison_steps.details: While the street address matches (Mårten Krakowgatan 2, 411 04 Göteborg), per rule 4.1.3.4.1 critical limitation, this rule requires that the certificate's company name CAN BE IDENTIFIED in the invoice. 'Korab International' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Shared address alone is NOT sufficient evidence that they are the same legal party. Different legal parties can share the same address.

comparison_steps.description: Check if difference is only generic organization words
comparison_steps.details: The core names differ: 'Korab International' vs 'KorCo'. This is not a case of utelämnade generiska organisationsord — the identity-bearing core itself is different.

comparison_steps.description: Check if difference is only in legal form abbreviation
comparison_steps.details: Both use 'AB' as legal form. The difference lies in the company name itself, not the legal form.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate name is exact subset of invoice name
comparison_steps.details: 'Korab International AB' is not a subset of 'KorCo AB' and vice versa. Different identity-bearing names.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate has an extra division word
comparison_steps.details: The names do not share a distinctive core word. 'Korab' and 'KorCo' are different words.

comparison_steps.description: Check if names differ by single character with confirming identifier
comparison_steps.details: The names differ by far more than a single character. 'Korab International' vs 'KorCo' — multiple characters differ.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in all invoice text
rules_applied.outcome: Consignor name 'Korab International' not found anywhere in invoice

rules_applied.description: Juridisk part – company name comparison with strict name matching limits

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Korab International AB' at Mårten Krakowgatan 2, SE411 04 Göteborg, Sweden. Invoice issuer is 'KorCo AB' at Mårten Krakowgatan 2, 411 04 Göteborg, Sweden. While the addresses share the same street and postal code, the company names are fundamentally different: 'Korab International' vs 'KorCo'. Per rule 4.1.3.1 (gränser för namnmatchning), 'Korab' vs 'KorCo' constitutes a different word (not a minor spelling variation), and 'International' is present in the certificate but absent from the invoice. The full sequential prövning 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.8 was performed and no rule produces MATCH. Per rule 4.1.3.4.1 critical limitation, shared address without name match is NOT sufficient. Result: MISMATCH.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Korab International AB' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan är utställd av 'KorCo AB'. Dessa utgör olika företagsnamn — 'Korab' och 'KorCo' är olika ord, och 'International' saknas helt i fakturans företagsnamn. Trots att gatuadressen överensstämmer kan delad adress inte ensamt styrka att det rör sig om samma juridiska part (regel 4.1.3.4.1). Fullständig sekventiell prövning 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.8 genomförd utan MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Jamana Printers Limited, Plot No. 9 Nyerere Road, Pugu Road, P.O Box 5584, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
consignee.invoice_value: Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti., Akçaburgaz Mah. 3437 Sok No:28/2, Esenyurt / Istanbul, Turkey

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has a clear 'SOLD TO' field containing 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti.' in Turkey. This is the authoritative consignee per priority 1.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee to invoice SOLD TO
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Jamana Printers Limited'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti.'. Completely different company names. No common identity-bearing words.

comparison_steps.description: Compare countries
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignee country: Tanzania. Invoice SOLD TO country: Turkey. Different countries.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Jamana Printers' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.details: 'Jamana Printers' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text — not in SOLD TO, not in any delivery address, header, footer, or other section.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning – SOLD TO is primary billing field
rules_applied.outcome: SOLD TO identified as authoritative consignee field

rules_applied.description: Name verification – compare certificate consignee to invoice
rules_applied.outcome: MISMATCH – completely different company names and countries

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Jamana Printers Limited' in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. Invoice SOLD TO is 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti.' in Istanbul, Turkey. These are completely different companies in different countries. 'Jamana Printers' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Both name and country are mismatched. Result: MISMATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Jamana Printers Limited' i Tanzania kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti.' i Turkiet som köpare. Helt olika företag i helt olika länder.

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.details: No article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identify identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'Newsprint'. Invoice goods: 'Fully Bleached Liner'. 'Newsprint' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. 'Newsprint' and 'Fully Bleached Liner' are entirely different paper products — newsprint is uncoated groundwood paper for newspapers, while fully bleached liner is a packaging paperboard product. These are not synonyms, not spelling variations, and not abbreviations of each other. The word 'Newsprint' cannot be identified in the invoice text.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate uses generic description with invoice reference
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not use a generic description with 'according to invoice' or similar. It specifies 'Newsprint' as a specific product. Additionally, the invoice number referenced in the certificate (51572) does not match the invoice number in the invoice file (51843).

rules_applied.outcome: MISMATCH – 'Newsprint' not found in invoice; invoice describes 'Fully Bleached Liner'

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as '756 Reels Newsprint'. Invoice describes goods as '25 Reels: Fully Bleached Liner'. The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'Newsprint'. This word does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice product is 'Fully Bleached Liner' — a completely different paper product. Per rule 4.3.3, matching cannot be based on synonymy, semantic interpretation, or industry knowledge. 'Newsprint' ≠ 'Fully Bleached Liner'. Additionally, even the quantity of reels differs significantly: 756 vs 25. Result: MISMATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Newsprint' (tidningspapper) kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'Fully Bleached Liner' som är en helt annan pappersprodukt. Dessutom skiljer sig antalet rullar väsentligt: 756 i certifikatet vs 25 i fakturan.

quantity.invoice_value: TOTAL NET WEIGHT: 25.356 MT / TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 25,356 KG

comparison_steps.description: Identify the verification quantity from box 7
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains '496.616 MT'. This is the verification-basis quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 496.616 in invoice
comparison_steps.details: The value 496.616 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Invoice shows 25.356 MT (net weight) and 25,356 KG (gross weight). These are entirely different quantities.

comparison_steps.description: Check if multiple invoices are present
comparison_steps.details: Only one invoice in the document pair.

comparison_steps.description: Check if unit conversion resolves the discrepancy
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 496.616 MT. Invoice NW: 25.356 MT, GW: 25,356 KG (≈25.356 MT). Even after conversion, 496.616 MT ≠ 25.356 MT. The values are fundamentally different.

comparison_steps.description: Check if unit weight derivation applies
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not specify per-piece weight.

comparison_steps.description: Check if multiple rows sum to certificate quantity
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has only one product line. Its total is 25.356 MT, far from 496.616 MT.

comparison_steps.description: Check if row-level weights can be summed
comparison_steps.details: Only one row. Total is 25.356 MT. Does not match 496.616 MT.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – search for certificate quantity in invoice
rules_applied.outcome: MISMATCH – 496.616 MT not found in invoice; invoice shows 25.356 MT

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 quantity: 496.616 MT. Invoice total net weight: 25.356 MT, total gross weight: 25,356 KG (which is 25.356 MT after normalization). The certificate's quantity of 496.616 MT cannot be identified in the invoice. The invoice total weight is approximately 5% of the certificate's stated weight. All undantag (3A–3E) were prövade and none are applicable. Result: MISMATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 496,616 MT kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger en totalvikt på 25,356 MT (netto) respektive 25 356 KG (brutto). Värdena skiljer sig fundamentalt.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin to invoice origin after normalization
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origin: 'Norway'. Invoice origin: 'Sweden'. These are different countries. No normalization rule can equate Norway and Sweden.

rules_applied.outcome: Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden'

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Norway' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden'. Norway and Sweden are two different countries. No normalization, EU-equivalence, or other rule makes these equivalent. Result: MISMATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'Norway' som ursprungsland. Fakturan anger 'Sweden' som ursprungsland. Dessa är olika länder och kan inte likställas genom normalisering.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Document A identified as certificate, Document B identified as invoice. Certificate references invoice 51572 but invoice shows 51843 — no invoice number match. Consignor 'Korab International AB' not found in invoice (issuer is 'KorCo AB'). Consignee 'Jamana Printers Limited' not found in invoice.

FAILED. None of three criteria met: (1) Invoice number 51572 ≠ 51843, (2) Consignor 'Korab International AB' not identifiable in invoice, (3) Consignee 'Jamana Printers Limited' not identifiable in invoice. Per rule 8.6, this constitutes an invalid document pair. Result: NOT_IDENTICAL.
No LC reference found. Standard verification applies.
'Korab International' not found anywhere in invoice text.
MISMATCH – 'Korab International AB' vs 'KorCo AB' are different company names.
Not applicable – names are not prefix-truncated versions of each other.
Not applicable – 'KorCo' is not a recognized abbreviation of 'Korab International'.
Not applicable – shared address but certificate name not identifiable in invoice (critical limitation 4.1.3.4.1).
Not applicable – core names differ ('Korab' vs 'KorCo').
Not applicable – both use 'AB', difference is in company name.
Not applicable – names do not share same identity-bearing core.
Not applicable – no shared distinctive core word.
Not applicable – names differ by far more than one character.
SOLD TO field identified as primary billing field.
MISMATCH – 'Jamana Printers Limited' (Tanzania) vs 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti.' (Turkey).
MISMATCH – 'Newsprint' not found in invoice; invoice has 'Fully Bleached Liner'.
MISMATCH – 496.616 MT not found in invoice (invoice shows 25.356 MT).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: KorCo AB could be a trading name or abbreviation of Korab International AB since they share the same street address
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.3.4.1 (critical limitation), shared address alone is NOT sufficient to establish same legal party. The certificate's company name 'Korab International' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Different legal parties can share the same address. No confirming identifier (VAT number, org number) links them. Per rule 4.1.3.1 (gränser för namnmatchning), 'Korab' vs 'KorCo' are different words, not spelling variations.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: This could be a valid document pair where KorCo AB is the parent/subsidiary of Korab International AB
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.3.1, the system is forbidden from assuming group relationships, parent/subsidiary relationships, or agent/trading relationships. No evidence in the documents supports such a relationship.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice could still be valid for this certificate despite different invoice numbers
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate references invoice 51572, invoice shows 51843. Per rule 8.6, invoice number does not match. Combined with consignor and consignee mismatches, no pairing criteria are met.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan utgör inte ett giltigt dokumentpar. Certifikatet avser faktura 51572 från Korab International AB till Jamana Printers Limited i Tanzania för 756 rullar tidningspapper (Newsprint) med ursprung Norge, men den bifogade fakturan är nr 51843 från KorCo AB till Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj i Turkiet för 25 rullar Fully Bleached Liner med ursprung Sverige. Samtliga kontrollpunkter — avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland — uppvisar avvikelser.
summary_of_mismatches: Consignor: Certificate 'Korab International AB' vs Invoice 'KorCo AB' – different company names
Consignee: Certificate 'Jamana Printers Limited, Tanzania' vs Invoice 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti., Turkey' – different companies and countries
Goods: Certificate 'Newsprint' vs Invoice 'Fully Bleached Liner' – different products
Quantity: Certificate '496.616 MT' vs Invoice '25.356 MT' – different weights
Origin: Certificate 'Norway' vs Invoice 'Sweden' – different countries
Invoice reference: Certificate references invoice 51572, invoice shows 51843
blocking_issues: Pairing validation failed – no criteria met per rule 8.6

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.rule_applied: Parningsvalidering – certifikatets fakturareferens matchar inte fakturanumret i den bifogade fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatet refererar till faktura nr 51572 och order nr 28750. Den bifogade fakturan har nr 51843 och order nr 28949. Ingen av referenserna överensstämmer. Inget av de tre parningskriterierna (fakturareferens, consignor, consignee) uppfylls.

sections.certificate_value: Korab International AB, Mårten Krakowgatan 2, SE411 04, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: KorCo AB, Mårten Krakowgatan 2, 411 04 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Juridisk part – olika företagsnamn; 'Korab International AB' kan inte identifieras i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Korab International AB' och fakturans utställare 'KorCo AB' har olika företagsnamn. 'Korab International' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Trots gemensam gatuadress kan delad adress inte ensamt styrka att det rör sig om samma juridiska part. Fullständig sekventiell prövning 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.8 genomförd utan MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Jamana Printers Limited, Plot No. 9 Nyerere Road, Pugu Road, P.O Box 5584, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
sections.invoice_value: Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti., Akçaburgaz Mah. 3437 Sok No:28/2, Esenyurt / Istanbul, Turkey
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarverifiering – helt olika företag i helt olika länder
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Jamana Printers Limited' i Tanzania kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är 'Graftek Matbaa Ve Ambalaj San.Tic.Ltd.Sti.' i Turkiet. Helt olika företagsnamn och helt olika länder (Tanzania vs Turkiet).

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Newsprint' kan inte identifieras i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'Newsprint' (tidningspapper). Fakturan anger 'Fully Bleached Liner' (helblekt liner). Dessa är helt olika pappersprodukter. 'Newsprint' förekommer inte i fakturan. Dessutom skiljer sig antalet rullar väsentligt (756 vs 25).

sections.invoice_value: TOTAL NET WEIGHT: 25.356 MT / TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT: 25,356 KG
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – certifikatets kvantitet kan inte identifieras i fakturan
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 496,616 MT. Fakturan anger 25,356 MT (netto) respektive 25 356 KG (brutto, ≈25,356 MT). Värdena skiljer sig fundamentalt — certifikatets vikt är nästan 20 gånger fakturans. Samtliga undantag (3A–3E) prövade utan tillämpbarhet.

sections.rule_applied: Ursprungslandverifiering – certifikatets ursprungsland skiljer sig från fakturans
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'Norway' som ursprungsland. Fakturan anger 'Sweden'. Dessa är olika länder. Ingen normaliseringsregel kan likställa Norge och Sverige.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints show MISMATCH. comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. All motivations are consistent with MISMATCH status. No motivation suggests MATCH while status is MISMATCH or vice versa.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: Not applicable — comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL, not IDENTICAL. Confidence floor rule only applies to IDENTICAL results.
